backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing super admin setup, user profiles, admin permissions, and access control with storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two frontend features to affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing numerous frontend files and their roles across pages and components.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app routing file defining extensive route tree for all pages using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/Banner.tsx: Component displaying the current banner with cache-busting, GIF detection, and fallback handling.
frontend/src/components/BannerManager.ts: Admin tool for uploading, previewing, validating, and managing banner images via device or URL.
frontend/src/components/FacebookPresence: Renders a Facebook Page Plugin iframe with loading and fallback states, adjusting height dynamically.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays the site footer with school info, contact details, and a Facebook link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Implements the main navigation header with data‑driven menus, login handling, and mobile drawer support.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps the page layout with banner, header, main content outlet, and footer.
frontend/src/components/PageHeader.tsx: Shows a stylized page header with optional background, description, and blinking title behavior.
frontend/src/components/PhilippineTimeCl: Displays a live-updating Philippine Standard Time sentence with an accompanying clock icon.
frontend/src/components/SchoolActivities: Fetches and displays school activity images in an autoplaying carousel with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/WeatherForecastS: Shows current weather and a 3‑day forecast for Barobo with icon mapping and load/error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refetching dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBaroboWeather.ts: Provides a React Query hook that fetches Barobo weather data from Open-Meteo and formats current and 3‑day forecast details.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity provider and hook managing authentication state, login flow, and identity persistence using AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines multiple React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, roles, permissions, super admin status, and placeholder events and announcements.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets Tailwind base styles and custom theme variables, including color palettes, dark mode, menu styling, and Quill editor overrides.
frontend/src/lib/externalBlobUpload.ts: Utility for uploading files via ExternalBlob with progress tracking and resilient URL validation using retries and fallbacks.
frontend/src/lib/facebookPagePlugin.ts: Builds a configurable Facebook Page Plugin iframe URL from provided display options.
frontend/src/lib/imageProxy.ts: Utilities to detect cloud providers, convert their URLs, proxy media through backend, and validate image/video accessibility with detailed error handling.
frontend/src/lib/uploadErrorMessage.ts: Maps upload errors into categorized, user-friendly messages and provides helpers to parse and log them.
frontend/src/lib/urlConverter.ts: Converts Google Drive, OneDrive, Dropbox, and Google Photos links into direct-access URLs using pattern matching and fallbacks.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with query client and Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/pages/ActionResearchPage.ts: Static page outlining action research details, areas, and processes with multiple informational cards.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard handling identity, roles, permissions, and super-admin initialization with UI actions and notifications.
frontend/src/pages/AdvisoriesCircularsPa: Static page placeholder for advisories and circulars using a simple card layout.
Admin page for editing alumni content and managing alumni profiles with create, update, and delete functions. Includes form handling, validation, and identity checks.
frontend/src/pages/AlumniPage.tsx: Public alumni page displaying alumni content and profiles with loading, error handling, and styled sections. Fetches and renders main content and alumni profiles.
frontend/src/pages/AnalyticsDashboardPag: Super Admin–restricted dashboard showing visitor and login analytics using charts and summary cards. Fetches multiple analytics datasets and blocks unauthorized users.
frontend/src/pages/ARALProgramPage.tsx: Static page describing the ARAL reading program using styled card components.
frontend/src/pages/ArchivedIssuancesPage: Static page providing a placeholder section for archived issuances. Displays a simple message indicating future availability.
Admin page providing banner upload and management via the BannerManager component. Includes a simple header and wrapper layout.
frontend/src/pages/BKDPage.tsx: Informational page describing the BKD literacy program and its goals. Includes static text content in a styled card layout.
frontend/src/pages/BNHSHymnManagementPag: Admin page for uploading and managing the BNHS Hymn video via file or URL with preview, validation, and upload progress tracking. Requires identity verification and uses blob upload utilities.
frontend/src/pages/BrigadaEskwelaPage.ts: Informational page outlining the Brigada Eskwela school maintenance program. Presents static descriptive content in a card format.
frontend/src/pages/BYESOPage.tsx: Informational page describing the BYESO program and its community support initiatives. Uses a static card layout with program details.
frontend/src/pages/ChildProtectionPolicy: Static page detailing the school's child protection policy and its safety commitments. Renders explanatory text within a styled card.
frontend/src/pages/CitizenCharterManagem: Admin page for managing citizen charter assets and sections, including background images, static images, and various editable info sections.
frontend/src/pages/CitizenCharterPage.ts: Public-facing citizen charter page displaying contact info, office hours, school hours, and optional background and static images.
frontend/src/pages/ClassroomObservationP: Static page presenting information about classroom observation and its role in teaching evaluation.
frontend/src/pages/ClubsOrganizationsPag: Displays student clubs and special organizations with descriptions and icons.
frontend/src/pages/DepEdMemorandaPage.ts: Placeholder page for listing DepEd memoranda when available.

frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Homepage showing hymn video, visitor tracking, weather, announcements, and DepEd vision/mission data.
frontend/src/pages/InfrastructurePage.ts: Static page presenting school infrastructure and facilities information.
frontend/src/pages/InkspirerPage.tsx: Empty placeholder page with no content.
frontend/src/pages/INSETPage.tsx: Static page describing the INSET teacher training program.

frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme extensions, color tokens, container settings, and plugin usage.
project_state.json: Defines project metadata, existing features, and pending admin control feature requests.
